# ExpressiveSharp

> Modern C# syntax in LINQ expression trees — source-generated at compile time

ExpressiveSharp is a Roslyn source generator that enables modern C# syntax (null-conditional ?., switch expressions, pattern matching) inside LINQ expression trees. It emits Expression<TDelegate> factory code at compile time from [Expressive]-decorated members and integrates with EF Core, MongoDB, and any IQueryable provider.

## Table of Contents

- [Introduction](https://efnext.github.io/ExpressiveSharp/guide/introduction.md)
